---
title: "Videos"
date: 2026-03-20
date-modified: 2026-03-20
---

* [Stephen Kotkin: Strategic Costs of US Global Success](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=f6lYTZ7qcyY)
* [Jonathan Wolff: Social Equality: Then And Now](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=9xL1gyM4f3Q)
* [Timothy Williamson: Is Philosophy a Science?](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=O3LXQJ31SG4)
* [Alex Honnold Interviews Jimmy Chin](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=0z_xNFUBRqo)
